Package org.solenopsis.soap.metadata

Class LicenseDefinition

java.lang.Object
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.Metadata
org.solenopsis.soap.metadata.LicenseDefinition
public class LicenseDefinition extends Metadata

Java class for LicenseDefinition complex type

.

The following schema fragment specifies the expected content contained within this class.


 <complexType name="LicenseDefinition">
   <complexContent>
     <extension base="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}Metadata">
       <sequence>
         <element name="aggregationGroup" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="description" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="isPublished" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}boolean"/>
         <element name="label" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="licensedCustomPermissions" type="{http://soap.sforce.com/2006/04/metadata}LicensedCustomPermissions" maxOccurs="unbounded" minOccurs="0"/>
         <element name="licensingAuthority" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="licensingAuthorityProvider" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="minPlatformVersion" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="origin" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}string"/>
         <element name="revision" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="trialLicenseDuration" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
         <element name="trialLicenseQuantity" type="{http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema}int"/>
       </sequence>
     </extension>
   </complexContent>
 </complexType>

    • getLicensedCustomPermissions

      public List<LicensedCustomPermissions> getLicensedCustomPermissions()
      Gets the value of the licensedCustomPermissions property.

      This accessor method returns a reference to the live list, not a snapshot. Therefore, any modification you make to the returned list will be present inside the Jakarta XML Binding object. This is why there is not a set method for the licensedCustomPermissions property.

      For example, to add a new item, do as follows: 

       getLicensedCustomPermissions().add(newItem);

      Objects of the following type(s) are allowed in the list LicensedCustomPermissions

      Returns:
      The value of the licensedCustomPermissions property.
